game_info.title: VVVVVV - Gravity Flip Adventure
game_info.concept:
VVVVVV is a platform game all about exploring one simple mechanical idea - what if you reversed gravity instead of jumping? Help! Everyone has been teleported away randomly! As the heroic Captain Viridian, it's up to you to find your friends, bring them back to safety, and save the universe!

VVVVVV is a platform game all about exploring one simple mechanical idea - what if you reversed gravity instead of jumping?

The game is designed not to artificially gate your progress. In VVVVVV there are no locks, no power-ups, no switches, nothing to stop you progressing except the challenges themselves.

Key features:

  • Elegant, minimalistic level design.
  • Challenging, fast and fun gameplay.
  • Frequent checkpoints mean you never have to replay challenges you've already beaten.
  • Over half an hour of chiptune music by composer Magnus Pålsson.
  • Special game modes, including time trials and a no death mode.
  • A powerful and easy to use level editor for creating your own dimensions to explore.
game_info.description: You are Captain Viridian, exploring a dimension where gravity can be flipped at will! Your crew has been scattered across a mysterious facility filled with spikes, moving platforms, and treacherous obstacles. Navigate through challenging rooms by flipping gravity to walk on ceilings and floors. Collect all 6 crew members to win! Watch out for deadly spikes and avoid falling into the void. Each checkpoint saves your progress, so you can retry difficult sections without losing everything.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left: Move left
Arrow Right: Move right
Space: Flip gravity (switch between floor and ceiling)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart from start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement and gravity flip mechanics. Verifying the player can move left/right and successfully flip gravity to traverse the first room without dying.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move right using arrow keys, flip gravity when approaching obstacles, and navigate through the first few screens. Test collision detection with platforms and spikes.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should successfully traverse at least 2-3 rooms, flip gravity multiple times, and interact correctly with platforms. No crashes or physics glitches should occur.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing optimal pathfinding to collect all crew members and win the game. This verifies win condition logic and crew member collection mechanics.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use A* pathfinding to navigate toward the nearest uncollected crew member. Flip gravity optimally to avoid obstacles and spikes. Collect all 6 crew members in the most efficient path possible.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully collect all 6 crew members and trigger the win condition. Game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state. All crew members should be properly registered as collected.
